subject: Mathematics
topic: Use short value records during comparison work

task_sheet.title: Short Value Fill-In Record
instructions: Use short values and selections, not full prose responses.
Fill in each missing value only where the sheet asks for it.

tasks.label: Part A
tasks.prompt: Fill in the missing short values from the comparison notes.

render_hints.heading: Fill in the missing values
render_hints.help: Use short values only, not full sentences.
blank_prompts: The small package is ___ cm wide.
The fancy package is ___ cm tall.

tasks.label: Part B
tasks.prompt: Choose one option in each comparison row.

render_hints.heading: Choose one option in each row

tasks.label: Part C
tasks.prompt: Give one brief checkpoint response about which option seems most efficient.

render_hints.heading: Quick checkpoint
render_hints.help: Keep this to one or two short lines.

embedded_supports: Use the checkpoint space only for a brief response.
success_criteria: I used short value fills instead of prose.
I kept my comparison choices readable.
